modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: International calls are failing to connect on VoIP.

full_description_text: I'm having trouble making international calls using VoIP. Every time I try, the calls just won't go through. It's really frustrating because I need to reach someone overseas.
short_description: International calls are failing to connect on VoIP.
description: I'm having trouble making international calls using VoIP. Every time I try, the calls just won't go through. It's really frustrating because I need to reach someone overseas.
